Powered by TzKT API by Baking Bad · Taquito by Ecad Labs · Built by @webidente

Manual Guide

A) Check your oven balance

Go to the storage explorer on better-call.dev ↗ and locate your oven in the ovens bigmap by searching for your Tezos address. Make note of the oven ID, ctez_outstanding, and tez_balance.

B) Burn all ctez

  1. Go to the contract interaction page on better-call.dev ↗.
  2. Enter the following values under the mint_or_burn section:
    • id: Your oven ID
    • quantity: The negative of your ctez_outstanding balance (e.g. -100000000)
  3. Connect your wallet on that page and submit the transaction.

C) Withdraw all tez

  1. Stay on the same better-call.dev page.
  2. Select the withdraw entrypoint from the interact list.
  3. Enter the following values:
    • id: Your oven ID
    • amount: Your full tez_balance in mutez. (If the transaction fails, try a slightly smaller amount to account for fee changes)
    • to: Your wallet address
  4. Submit the transaction.
